# discord_guild_ban (Resource)

Bans a user from a Discord guild. Destroying the resource unbans the user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_guild_ban" "spammer" {
  server_id              = "123456789012345678"
  user_id                = "345678901234567890"
  reason                 = "Spamming invite links."
  delete_message_seconds = 86400 # purge last 24h of messages
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.
- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the user to ban.

### Optional

- `delete_message_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds of the user's recent messages to delete on ban (0–604800). Applied only at creation.
- `reason` (String) Audit log reason for the ban. Applied only at creation and not refreshed from the API.
